title: Cristallium
description: Meet The Cristallium! New Strongest Alloy In The World, Stronger Than Netherite!
body: This Mod Adds A New Alloy Named **Cristallium**, Which Is Made Out Of _Copper Ingot, Gold Nugget And Amethyst Shard_. This Alloy Is Stronger Than Netherite. Also To Make Things Balanced It Requires Smelting Form To Craft Which Is Made Out Of 5 Netherite Scraps And One Brick.
